title: Persistence Mechanism Established (Linux)
description: Detects Linux persistence via cron, systemd units, rc.local or authorized_keys modification.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT QIDNAME(qid) AS event_name, sourceip AS source_ip, username AS target_user, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS log_source, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS event_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%/etc/cron%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%authorized_keys%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%/etc/systemd/system%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%/etc/rc.local%' ) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 5 MINUTES
